'''Griv''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who worked for [[Mazzic]]. He was the pilot of [[Raptor (Preybird)|''Raptor'']] and one of Mazzic's guards. Along with [[Amber (smuggler)|Amber]], Griv was assigned to attack [[Niles Ferrier]] as he escaped from [[Hijarna]]. When Griv later joined [[Talon Karrde]]'s organization, he became a gunner aboard ''[[Wild Karrde]]''.

==Biography==
Griv was a former [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|law enforcement officer]] on a Rodian colony [[Planet/Legends|world]]. He was also trained on [[Human/Legends|Human]] first aid and was a skilled [[Medic/Legends|field medic]].<ref name="TTS" />
